name: Dog-friendly
description: Hotels that explicitly welcome dogs of all breeds and sizes.

name: Cat-friendly
description: Hotels that welcome cats and provide a comfortable stay for feline travellers.

name: Near Parks
description: Hotels within walking distance of dog-friendly parks and green spaces.

name: Luxury
description: 5-star hotels and upscale properties that welcome pets with premium amenities.

name: Beach Access
description: Pet-friendly hotels with direct or nearby beach access for your dog.

name: Dogs Stay Free
description: Hotels with no pet fee — your dog stays at no extra charge.
